title: Supermicro proposes $7B equity plan to help fulfill AI server orders
description: Supermicro (SMCI) plans $7B equity financing to fund AI server components and fill $39B in orders.

title: OnLogic to Showcase Practical Physical AI and Full-Facility Workload Consolidation at Automate 2026
description: Industrial computing leader cuts through cloud AI hype with live edge use cases, next-generation Intel® CoreTM Series 2 processing previews, and ultra-compact solutions for space-constrained environments at McCormick Place, Booth 867.

title: Anthropic, which claimed AI model was too risky for public to use, releases ‘safe’ version
description: Anthropic is launching the next iteration of its powerful artificial intelligence models to the general public – but with guardrails that cap its ability to wreak havoc in areas like cybersecurity and biological research. Anthropic said in a statement Tuesday that the new model, called Claude Fable 5, will allow users to query Mythos –...

title: Supermicro tumbles after-hours on large capital raise to fund AI server surge
